title: Prompt Template
description: Schema for .ai/prompts/ prompt template markdown files. Each prompt must have YAML frontmatter followed by structured sections.

frontmatter.description: YAML frontmatter between --- delimiters at the top of the file

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier matching the filename (without .md)

version.description: SemVer version for the prompt template

agents.description: Agent IDs that use this prompt (must exist in agent index.json)

output.description: Type of output this prompt produces (e.g. component-files, api-code, documentation)

required_variables.description: Template variables that must be provided when rendering

optional_variables.description: Template variables that may optionally be provided

sections.description: Markdown sections in order. Each must be present exactly once.

template_variables.description: All {{variable}} placeholders used in the template body
